context: Tests whether the agent uses the 'fix' type for bug fixes, references issues using the correct 'Token: value' footer format, uses imperative mood, and keeps headers within the 72-character limit.

checklist.name: fix type on all three
checklist.description: All three commit messages use the 'fix' type

checklist.name: Issue references present
checklist.description: All three commit messages include a footer that references the relevant issue number (#301, #178, #412)

checklist.name: Footer token:value format
checklist.description: Issue references use 'Token: value' format (e.g. 'Closes: #301' or 'Fixes: #301'), not inline mentions in the header or body

checklist.name: Blank line before footer
checklist.description: Each commit message with a footer has exactly one blank line separating the body (or header) from the footer

checklist.name: Imperative mood all three
checklist.description: All three headers use imperative mood (e.g. 'prevent', 'invalidate', 'return') not past tense ('fixed', 'prevented')

checklist.name: Header ≤ 72 chars all three
checklist.description: All three header lines are 72 characters or fewer

checklist.name: Lowercase descriptions
checklist.description: All three description portions (after the colon and space) begin with a lowercase letter

checklist.name: No trailing periods
checklist.description: None of the three headers end with a period

checklist.name: No implementation details in header
checklist.description: None of the three headers mention specific implementation details (e.g. '300ms debounce', 'HTTP 422 status code') — those belong in the body
